title: gamochaeta standleyi
intro: Gamochaeta standleyi, also known as Standley's gumweed, is a plant species within the aster family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been used to treat various conditions including colds, fever, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Gamochaeta standleyi can be consumed as a tea or infused in oil for topical application, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
